about.title: About Us
about.description: Sitecreator - your trusted partner in the digital world.
about.story: We have been providing quality web solutions to our clients since 2014. Our team consists of professionals from various fields.
about.missionText: To provide the highest quality digital solutions to each of our clients with an individual approach.
about.visionText: To be a leader in web development in Azerbaijan and the region.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with us and let's discuss your project.
contact.directTitle: Reach us through the channel that feels easiest
contact.directDescription: If you already know what you need, write to us directly. If you are still deciding, send a short message and we will help shape the right solution together.
contact.formTitle: Tell us what you want to build
contact.formDescription: Share a few details about your idea, target audience, or business goals. The clearer the message, the faster we can guide you to the right next step.
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

blog.title: Blog and Case Studies
blog.description: Useful articles, SEO-focused guides, and real project stories that help clients trust your process before they even write to you.
blog.emptyDescription: Your blog page is ready. Once you publish articles from admin, they will appear here automatically.
blog.ctaEyebrow: Need this for your business too?
blog.ctaTitle: Let's turn your next idea into a high-converting product.
blog.ctaDescription: If this article matches the kind of result you want, we can shape the right website, funnel, or SEO roadmap together.
